insight:
Yesterday was a solid recovery day with some excellent signs from your body! With no formal training and only 5,793 steps, you clearly prioritized rest, which paid off beautifully. Your 9.1 hours of sleep, low stress level of 23/100, and that impressive 45 bpm resting heart rate show your body is responding well to the taper phase just 10 days out from Chester.

Your HRV at 109ms sits perfectly in your optimal range, and combined with those outstanding recovery markers, you're cleared for whatever training you have planned today. No need to modify your session - your body is telling us it's ready to work and absorbing the training load beautifully.

With 2,381 calories burned yesterday, you likely hit close to your intake target, but make sure you're still prioritizing that 175g protein goal today. Your body is in prime recovery mode, so fuel it well to maintain this excellent trajectory toward race day.
